project_info.name: Tours North Canada
project_info.vision: Modernize the Canadian tourism experience through a 9-layer taxonomy engine and 2026 Design System.
project_info.architecture: Database-less static frontend with Alpine.js hydration and JSON inventory. Supabase as live backend via vw_master_inventory.

phase.name: Toronto Destination Overhaul
phase.description: Revamped toronto.html with carousels, bento grids, and dynamic Alpine.js loading.

phase.name: 9-Layer Taxonomy Engine
phase.description: Implementing the L1-L9 data schema to enable concierge-style navigation and smart bundling.

milestones.milestone: Slug Engine: FNV-1a hashing, canonical URLs
Hybrid Search Engine: local + Supabase FTS

phase.name: Supabase Live Backend Integration
phase.description: Transition from static JSON to live PostgreSQL inventory via vw_master_inventory.

milestones.milestone: Verify live 9-layer data hydration on Toronto hub

phase.name: Automated Inventory Scaling
phase.description: Roll out L1-L9 schema to all 600+ product files and automate hub generation.

current_context.current_focus: Mass migration of static HTML/JSON catalog to the new 9-layer taxonomy schema.
current_context.next_action: Iterate through product directory to inject L1-L9 metadata.
